commits.subject: feat(github): add provenance cache model
commits.author: Gabriel Bezerra Rodrigues

commits.subject: feat(github): add auth diagnostics
commits.author: Gabriel Bezerra Rodrigues

commits.subject: chore(sdk): defer public sdk contract
commits.author: Gabriel Bezerra Rodrigues

commits.subject: test(adapters): dogfood nestjs adapter
commits.author: Gabriel Bezerra Rodrigues

commits.subject: fix(adapters): serve fumadocs docs artifacts
commits.author: Gabriel Bezerra Rodrigues

commits.subject: test(dogfood): add npm cli validation
commits.author: Gabriel Bezerra Rodrigues

commits.subject: feat(wiki): add navigation maps and search index
commits.author: Gabriel Bezerra Rodrigues

commits.subject: feat(docs): switch wiki build to fumadocs output
commits.author: Gabriel Bezerra Rodrigues

commits.subject: docs: align public docs with shipped package behavior
commits.author: Gabriel Bezerra Rodrigues

commits.subject: feat(core): integrate Mermaid diagrams in build (T2.1)
commits.author: Gabriel Bezerra Rodrigues

commits.subject: fix: multiple bug fixes from code review
commits.author: Gabriel Bezerra Rodrigues

commits.subject: feat(cli): integrate Fumadocs renderer in build command
commits.author: Gabriel Bezerra Rodrigues

commits.subject: feat(renderer): generate fumadocs-compatible MDX output (T1.2)
commits.author: Gabriel Bezerra Rodrigues

commits.subject: feat(renderer): add renderer mode selection (T1.1)
commits.author: Gabriel Bezerra Rodrigues

commits.subject: test: add fresh npm install dogfood validation script (T0.4)
commits.author: Gabriel Bezerra Rodrigues

commits.subject: chore: reconcile published package versions (T0.1)
commits.author: Gabriel Bezerra Rodrigues

commits.subject: docs: align public docs with shipped package behavior
commits.author: Gabriel Bezerra Rodrigues

commits.subject: chore: remove release artifacts from source tree
commits.author: Gabriel Bezerra Rodrigues

commits.subject: docs: add execution plan based on research findings
commits.author: Gabriel Bezerra Rodrigues

commits.subject: docs: add detailed product task backlog
commits.author: Gabriel Bezerra Rodrigues
